search_string: ('large language model' OR 'GPT') AND ('software testing' OR 'unit testing') AND ('mutation testing' OR 'coverage')
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently been used to generate mutants in both research work and in industrial practice. However, there has been no comprehensive empirical study of their performance for this increasingly important LLM-based Software Engineering application. To address this, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study evaluating BugFarm and LLMorpheus...
